message:
feat(FJ-P2C-002-E): unit + property tests with structured logging

41 tests total for fj-api:
- 17 unit tests (lib.rs): basic transforms, composition, errors, modes
- 19 integration tests (api_transform_suite.rs): API entry points,
  transform stacking, error messages, mode config, TTL construction,
  schema contract verification
- 5 property tests (proptest): jit identity, grad=2x, vmap increment,
  value_and_grad consistency, jit(grad)==grad equivalence (256+ cases each)

All tests emit structured TestLogV1 entries via fj-test-utils.
Clippy clean. Full workspace passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
